mapper.select: SELECT us.mapping_id, us.user_id, us.site_id, s.name AS site_name, s.address AS site_address, us.assigned_at FROM user_site us INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = us.site_id WHERE us.user_id = #{userId} AND us.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY s.site_id DESC

SELECT target_us.mapping_id, target_us.user_id, target_us.site_id, s.name AS site_name, s.address AS site_address, target_us.assigned_at FROM user_site target_us INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = target_us.site_id INNER JOIN user_site manager_us ON manager_us.site_id = target_us.site_id WHERE target_us.user_id = #{userId} AND manager_us.user_id = #{managerUserId} AND target_us.deleted_at IS NULL AND manager_us.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY s.site_id DESC
SELECT mapping_id, user_id, site_id, assigned_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM user_site WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM site WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND site_id IN
#{siteId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_site us INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = us.site_id WHERE us.user_id = #{userId} AND us.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND us.site_id IN
#{siteId}
